title: Inheritance
description: Create a subclass that inherits from a parent class using the < syntax.
problemStatement:
Family trees! Create a class `User`. Then, create a subclass `Admin` that inherits from `User`.

**Requirement:** Use the `<` operator for inheritance.
hints: Inheritance allows a 'child' class to take on all the methods and variables of a 'parent' class.
solutionCode:
class User
end

class Admin < User
end
